element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Must hit platform beneath to flip, then kick before recovery
Core movement mechanic across all phases
Limited uses (3x); flips all enemies on contact
Can only be flipped when touching platform
Converts platforms to slippery ice when present
Roam screen freely; cannot be flipped; instant death on contact
Form on platform undersides; fully formed icicles cause instant death
Emerge from pipes after defeating enemies; collectible for points

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting bonus coins from defeated enemies
Using POW block to flip multiple enemies
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty: early phases introduce single enemy types with manageable POW block usage; later phases stack hazards (multiple enemy types + icicles + fireballs) creating compound tension

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bonus coins appear conditionally after enemy defeat; collection optional but incentivized for score

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces Shellcreeper and basic flip-then-kick mechanic with POW block support; manageable pacing with clear enemy spawn from pipes
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduces Sidestepper and Fighter Fly variants; increases enemy spawn rate and diversifies enemy behavior (jump patterns); POW block remains valuable defensive tool
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stacks multiple hazard types: Fireballs (free-roaming, unflippable), Icicles (environmental hazard), Slipice (platform modifier) alongside standard enemies; compressed decision space and heightened time pressure
notable_spikes: Introduction of Fireballs (roaming, unflippable hazard breaks previous containment patterns)
Icicle formation in later rounds (environmental penalty not tied to enemy defeat)
Slipice presence (adds hazard layer to platform mechanics)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each phase uses series of horizontal platforms with pipes at screen corners; wraparound screen allows horizontal escape routes; POW block anchors center positioning strategy
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic phase structure applies across all phases

notable_level_patterns.description: New enemy type introduced, then subsequent phase adds environmental hazard (icicles, fire) while maintaining enemy complexity; creates cumulative difficulty without single-mechanic bottleneck
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early phases introduce one enemy type; later phases combine Shellcreeper + Sidestepper + Fireballs + Icicles

notable_level_patterns.description: Limited to 3 uses per phase; forces strategic timing—use early for safety vs. reserve for emergencies; depletion forces pure enemy-handling skill
Enemy flipped → time window to kick before recovery → failure resets to unflipped state; penalizes hesitation and creates micro-tension spikes
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Core loop for all four base enemy types
